_comment: Role taxonomy for the role-based theme (Phase 1). Each role maps to an absolute styling tier (theme.Tier) used by generate.py. The category accent supplies the hue; the role supplies size/brightness. Phase-2 editor surfaces these labels instead of raw tier numbers; tier number is otherwise just priority (filter generated high->low->hide).

roles.desc: Top per-accent spotlight; brightest + biggest. May be an empty highlight band.
Very strong: accent border + accent fill, large font, effect.
Strong: accent text/border on dark fill.
